columns.extraction_plan: The text states: '...the median follow-up was 28.9 months, with 136 deaths in the ADT-alone group and 101 deaths in the combination group.' The combination group is the treatment group. Therefore, No. of Deaths - N | Treatment is 101.

The text states: '...the median follow-up was 28.9 months, with 136 deaths in the ADT-alone group and 101 deaths in the combination group.' The ADT-alone group is the control group. Therefore, No. of Deaths - N | Control is 136.
